hypotheses.claim: Daily Intentia check-ins reduce unresolved conflict duration without increasing pressure.
hypotheses.measurement: median time from conflict signal to repair signal; pressure score before/after advice
hypotheses.falsifier: conflict duration or pressure increases for 3 consecutive weeks versus baseline
hypotheses.minimum_evidence: >=14 days baseline, >=30 days intervention, both partners' consented labels

hypotheses.claim: Separating facts/inferences/unknowns reduces hallucinated interpretations of the partner.
hypotheses.measurement: rate of unsupported claims per 100 messages in manual audit
hypotheses.falsifier: unsupported-claim rate does not decrease by >=20% after reality gate

hypotheses.claim: Consent-gated advice preserves autonomy while allowing intimacy to increase.
hypotheses.measurement: intimacy signals, boundary respect signals, post-event comfort ratings
hypotheses.falsifier: boundary violations or regret labels increase above baseline
hypotheses.minimum_evidence: paired pre/post ratings and explicit revocation channel

hypotheses.claim: Event-sourced multimodal memory improves narrative continuity and reduces rupture amnesia.
hypotheses.measurement: recall agreement between partners and archive-derived timeline
hypotheses.falsifier: archive-derived summaries mismatch partner accounts in >15% of audited episodes
hypotheses.minimum_evidence: >=20 episodes manually reviewed by both partners

hypotheses.claim: The repository becomes investable only when reproducibility, consent, and product metrics are measurable.
hypotheses.measurement: CI pass rate, reproducible report hash, pilot retention, willingness-to-pay
hypotheses.falsifier: valuation claim cannot be reproduced from public/sanitized evidence bundle
hypotheses.minimum_evidence: signed pilot LOIs or paid users plus reproducible benchmarks

can_claim: Intentia stores and analyzes consented relationship events
Intentia computes operational scores from defined metrics
Intentia can generate hypotheses and advice with uncertainty labels
Intentia can be valued by cost, income, market, royalty, and option methods when inputs exist
cannot_claim_without_evidence: Intentia understands Dasha better than Dasha
Intentia measures hormones without lab data
Intentia is worth $23M as fair-market value without revenue, rights, audits, or comparable transactions
claim_boundary.upgrade_rule: Every extraordinary claim must map to a test, dataset, reproduction script, and falsifier.
